name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-dbbrain

metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Dbbrain SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Dbbrain SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-dbbrain
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common dbbrain
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.dbbrain.v20191016.models.AddUserContactRequest.Name
documentation:
联系人姓名，大小写字母+数字+下划线，最小 2 位最大 60 位的长度， 不能以"\_"开头，且联系人名保持唯一。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.dbbrain.v20191016.models.AddUserContactRequest.ContactInfo
documentation:

\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.dbbrain.v20191016.models.AddUserContactRequest.Product
documentation:
服务产品类型，固定值："mysql"。
\:rtype: str
